subcodes.first_line: O My friend and herald of My Cause! Upon thee be My glory and My mercy. I bear witness that thou hast set thine aim towards the Most Glorious Goal when it was raised up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیلی و مبلغ امری علیک بهائی و رحمتی اشهد انک قصدت المقصد الابهی اذ ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @chastisement and requital
